description: A food wholesaler needs to manage inventory with expiration dates to ensure products are sold before they expire.

nodes.task_description: Run a report to identify all inventory that is approaching its expiration date.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets a list of all products expiring in the next 30 days.

nodes.task_description: Notify the sales team to prioritize selling these items.

expected_outcome.expected: The sales team is alerted to the expiring stock.

nodes.task_description: Offer a discount on the expiring items to encourage faster sales.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent applies a temporary discount to the products.
